tissue: higher expression of PURPL in melanoma tumors compared with normal skins
cell_type: PURPL acts as oncogene to promote tumor growth, colony formation, migration, and invasiveness in melanoma cells.

age: Male athymic nude mice (BALB/C-nu/nu, 4–5 weeks old)
